nasb.text: “For My people are foolish, They know Me not; They are stupid children And have no understanding. They are shrewd to do evil, But to do good they do not know.”

esv.text: “For my people are foolish; they know me not; they are stupid children; they have no understanding. They are ‘wise’—in doing evil! But how to do good they know not.”

cnv.text: “我的子民愚妄， 他們連我都不認識， 是無知的兒女， 沒有悟性； 他們有智慧行惡， 卻沒有知識行善。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“我的子民愚顽， 不认识我， 是蒙昧无知的儿女， 只知行恶，不知行善。”
